hero.identifier: dexDRONES is Dex's aerial wing for film-quality CC-BY 4.0 image-making.
hero.title: Film-quality CC-BY 4.0 aerial assets for the public.
hero.subhead: A semi-permanent wing of Dex Digital Sample Library, launching with Mojave Desert fieldwork and Alaska applications under review, with founding support from Kolari Vision.

proof.title: Proof of existing public use and institutional momentum.

whyExists.title: Open media infrastructure has a major aerial gap.
copy: Film-quality aerial footage is among the hardest material to access openly, and that scarcity limits what the public sphere of moving-image making can become.
dexDRONES exists to build a durable public pathway into that space by publishing reusable field materials under CC-BY 4.0 instead of one-off private production outputs.
The long-term objective is practical: help make CC-only motion-picture workflows increasingly possible at professional quality, for artists, educators, institutions, and developers.

cards.title: Aerial video
cards.body: Film-quality flight captures published under CC-BY 4.0 for direct editorial and production reuse.

cards.title: Field stills
cards.body: Companion still imagery from production sessions for educational, civic, and visual-reference use.

cards.title: Ambient sound
cards.body: Location audio and atmospheric field materials to support audiovisual and narrative workflows.

cards.title: Imaging studies
cards.body: Methods and field notes documenting how capture conditions, permits, and imaging choices affect reusable outputs.

cards.title: Alaska applications
cards.body: Applications in review for Juneau, Valdez, Anchorage, and Worthington Alaska State Park.

cards.title: East Coast scouting
cards.body: Additional mountain and forest location scouting through DMOs, state parks, and private land conversations.

kolari.title: Built with founding support from Kolari Vision
copy: Kolari Vision donated work on a full-spectrum conversion for one camera body, provided filter support, and helped establish the launch imaging workflow.
This support expands dexDRONES field flexibility and strengthens a professional capture foundation for publishing film-quality CC-BY 4.0 aerial assets beyond visible-light cinematography.
The sponsor role is operational, not decorative: it directly shapes the imaging capabilities and public value of the wing.

cards.title: Public cultural infrastructure
cards.body: Support a reusable public resource rather than a closed campaign deliverable.

cards.title: Visible early-stage precedent
cards.body: Help shape the institutional model for open aerial image-making while the wing is being formalized.

cards.title: Credible institutional base
cards.body: Dex already demonstrates catalog scale, active users, and sustained public download activity.

cards.title: Meaningful placement
cards.body: Sponsors and access partners are integrated into the production logic and public narrative of the program.

cards.title: Imaging partners
cards.body: Support camera conversion, optics, and technical workflows that expand capture capability and visual range.

cards.title: Travel / fieldwork underwriting
cards.body: Fund mobility and production windows so more locations can be covered responsibly each season.

cards.title: Permitting / access partners
cards.body: Help secure lawful access and permit pathways for parks, municipalities, and managed lands.

cards.title: Institutional / regional collaborators
cards.body: Connect dexDRONES with local priorities, educational partners, and long-term public-benefit use cases.

items.quote: Film-quality aerial footage is among the hardest material to access openly, and that gap limits what the public sphere of moving-image making can become. dexDRONES is our effort to build a durable public pathway into that space.
items.author: Sebastian Suarez-Solis

items.quote: We believe in innovating in all areas of photography and videography from infrared to beyond. We are proud to support dexDRONES in publishing film-quality aerial assets under CC-BY 4.0 to the general public.
items.author: Kolari Vision

support.title: Expand travel, permitting, imaging capacity, and field depth.
copy: Support helps expand the number of locations, the depth of each field session, and the long-term public value of the wing.
As dexDRONES grows across regular seasons, underwriting in travel, permitting, and imaging increases what can be responsibly published for free public reuse.

press.title: Download launch materials and contact the team.

aboutDex.title: dexDRONES is an equal pillar of Dex's public mission.
copy: Dex Digital Sample Library is a 501(c)(3) building an always-free, CC-BY 4.0 library of artist-made video and audio for reuse and remix with attribution.
dexDRONES extends that mission into film-quality aerial capture so open moving-image workflows can operate with fewer structural barriers and higher production value.
The model remains unchanged: public access first, rights clarity, and practical reuse at institutional quality.
